SELL now gated at 40% (was 35%). BUY is strongest LLM signal.

ranging.note2: 14 signals gated in ranging _default. Only 18 active. With per-ticker exemptions (BUG-158), metals get some back.

proposed_48pct.note: Marginal improvement. sentiment at 46.5% is borderline — 38K samples, consistently underperforming.

proposed_50pct.note: Aggressive. Would gate half of active signals. Not recommended — too many signals removed reduces ensemble diversity.

recommendations.title: Per-ticker directional accuracy
recommendations.description: IMPLEMENTED: accuracy_by_ticker_signal() now returns directional fields. signal_engine override copies them.
recommendations.expected_impact: High — prevents signals from voting in their weak direction per ticker.

recommendations.title: Directional gate 0.35 to 0.40
recommendations.description: IMPLEMENTED: catches macro_regime BUY (38.9%), fibonacci SELL (35.9%).

recommendations.title: Consider raising accuracy gate to 47%
recommendations.description: Would additionally gate sentiment (46.5% blended, 38K samples). Currently just above threshold.
recommendations.expected_impact: Low-medium — sentiment is consistently weak but removing it reduces voter count.

recommendations.title: Investigate momentum SELL direction
recommendations.description: momentum SELL at 44.6% escapes 40% directional gate. BUY 63.1% is strong. Could add a 42% directional gate later.
recommendations.expected_impact: Low — momentum SELL rarely votes in ranging (regime-weighted 1.3x BUY focus).

recommendations.title: Per-ticker signal blacklisting
recommendations.description: ministral on XAG (20.4%) should be fully suppressed, not just directionally gated. Consider explicit ticker×signal blacklist.

implemented_tonight: directional field propagation in signal_engine BUG-158 override
directional gate threshold raised from 0.35 to 0.40
new tests for directional accuracy asymmetry and macro_regime BUY gating
